subcodes.first_line: Exalted is He Who hath spoken and caused all things to speak forth His remembrance and praise, and exalted is He Who hath made manifest that which lay hidden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعالی من نطق و انطق الاشیاء بذکره و ثنائه و تعالی من اظهر ما کان مخزونا فی
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
